badge: Phase 1 Polish — Real-time engine, charts, themes

hero.subtitle: A focused, beautiful typing platform built for measurable improvement. Real-time WPM, accuracy and consistency — no clutter, no nonsense.

features.heading: Built for serious improvement
features.subheading: Everything you need to measure, analyze and elevate your typing.

engine.title: Real-time engine
engine.desc: Live WPM, accuracy, CPM and mistakes tracked per keystroke.

chart.title: WPM over time
chart.desc: See where you slowed down with a per-second chart on every result.

modes.title: Flexible modes
modes.desc: Time, words, quotes, paragraphs, stories, code, custom text or .txt upload.

dashboard.title: Personal dashboard
dashboard.desc: Track every run, watch your average climb and your errors shrink.

mistakes.title: Top mistakes
mistakes.desc: See which characters trip you up most so you can focus practice.

ai.title: AI coach
ai.desc: AI feedback, multi-language, virtual keyboard, smart error detection.

cta.title: Ready in 15 seconds.
cta.desc: No signup required to take your first test.
